creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
- update to 1.74
- add stage support
- cleanup MASTER_SITE
- add LICENSE
- install geonext-$lang start scrip only in $LOCALBASE/bin
- adjust slave ports

Changes:
- add support for java7

patch can be found here:
